campus: Hybrid course. Students will receive lecture content online and on campus during the designated day(s) and time(s) listed. Students must attend the online portion via the College's online platform CANVAS.  FAILURE TO ATTEND ONLINE AND IN PERSON CLASS MEETINGS MAY AFFECT ENROLLMENT IN THE COURSE AND/OR FINANCIAL AID BENEFITS. ACCESS TO A COMPUTER WITH A WEBCAM, MICROPHONE, SPEAKERS, & HIGH-SPEED INTERNET IS REQUIRED.

course_title: INTRO VARI FREQ DRIV SERVO CO
campus: Online Instructional Method
Hybrid & Electric Vehicles - 10206 - ASE 263 - 0

Online Class (using video conferencing tools). Students must log into CANVAS on the first day of class at 9:00AM and click “Announcements” for Online Orientation Information. Students enrolled must attend class online via the College’s online platform CANVAS; have a laptop or desktop; have reliable Internet access. THE CONTENT FOR THIS CLASS IS DELIVERED COMPLETELY ONLINE. STUDENTS ARE NOT REQUIRED TO ATTEND ON-CAMPUS SESSIONS. STUDENTS COMPLETE COURSE REQUIREMENTS WITHIN A WINDOW OF TIME DETERMINED BY THE INSTRUCTOR. FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE ATTENDANCE VERIFICATION ASSIGNMENT DURING THE FIRST WEEK OF CLASS MAY AFFECT ENROLLMENT IN THE COURSE AND/OR FINANCIAL AID BENEFITS.

course_title: END USER DESKTOP APPL SUP I

days: Tu W Th F Sa Su

campus: Hybrid Online Course Format:  This course is delivered in a hybrid format, combining both online and on-campus instruction. Students will engage with lecture content through the College’s online platform, CANVAS, as well as attend in-person sessions on the scheduled days and times. Regular participation is required in both the online and in-person components of the course. FAILURE TO ATTEND ONLINE AND IN-PERSON CLASS MEETINGS MAY AFFECT ENROLLMENT IN THE COURSE AND/OR FINANCIAL AID BENEFITS. ACCESS TO A COMPUTER WITH A WEBCAM, MICROPHONE, SPEAKERS, & HIGH-SPEED INTERNET IS REQUIRED.

ACCESS TO A COMPUTER WITH A WEBCAM, MICROPHONE, SPEAKERS, & HIGH-SPEED INTERNET IS REQUIRED.
